channel.title: UFO Sighting on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in UFO Sighting on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO
item.description:
The 2018 American science fiction film UFO stars Gillian Anderson and Alex Sharp. It follows a mathematics student who attempts to prove the existence of extraterrestrials after a UFO sighting causes electromagnetic interference. With the help of his professor, he deciphers a message containing the fine-structure constant and coordinates. The film was released directly to video on September 4, 2018.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_%282018_film%29
